channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Coco Martin Shares Details About Julia Montes Scene in 'Sigabo' Pilot Episode
item.description: The pilot episode of the upcoming TV series “Sigabo” has sparked interest among fans, especially with talks about a possible kissing scene involving Julia Montes. Coco Martin, who is closely associate...

item.title: Canvas Resolves Data Breach Incident Following Cyberattack on Global Universities
item.description: Instructure, the parent company of Canvas, a widely used learning management platform in postsecondary institutions, confirmed that it has reached an agreement with the hacking group ShinyHunters afte...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel and Senator Chris Van Hollen clash over drinking allegations during Senate hearing
item.description: During a tense Senate Appropriations Committee hearing on May 12, 2026, FBI Director Kash Patel clashed with Senator Chris Van Hollen over allegations of excessive drinking and unexplained absences by...

item.title: EMPD removes 300 unauthorised structures in Thembisa following court order
item.description: On Tuesday, the Ekurhuleni Metro Police Department (EMPD) in conjunction with the City of Ekurhuleni's Human Settlements Department demolished approximately 300 illegal structures on Portion 64 of Wit...

item.title: Tanzania Banking Sector Reports 16% Growth in Q1 2026 with CRDB and NMB Leading
item.description: During the first quarter of 2026, Tanzania's banking sector demonstrated strong performance, with net profit after tax reaching TZS 671 billion, marking a 16% increase from the same period last year. ...

item.title: Audi reveals interior features of upcoming Q9 SUV
item.description: Audi is giving us a sneak peek of its largest SUV yet, the Q9, designed for families needing extra space. The new Q9 will be available as a six-seater with two electrically adjustable individual seats...

item.title: UK Eurovision entrant Look Mum No Computer showcases inventive music museum and unique synthesiser creations
item.description: Sam Battle, known as Look Mum No Computer, has built a cult following with his inventive fusion of music and esoteric technology. Originally a side project from his indie band days, Battle now operate...

item.title: Labour Leadership Uncertainty as MPs Call for Starmer to Step Down
item.description: The latest episode of 'In The Room' examines the precarious position of Labour leader Keir Starmer. Following recent political manoeuvring, over 81 Labour MPs have formally requested his resignation, ...

item.title: Preliminary hearing for D4vd murder case delayed amid extensive evidence
item.description: The preliminary hearing in the murder case involving singer D4vd, whose legal name is David Anthony Burke, has been postponed until June 29 due to the sheer volume of digital evidence collected by pro...

item.title: Museveni begins seventh term as Uganda’s president amid opposition protests
item.description: Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni don officially start him seventh consecutive term as president, extend him reign wey start for 1986 go at least 2031. The inauguration happen for Kololo Independence ...

item.title: Tennessee Man with Outstanding U.S. Warrants Arrested in Winnipeg
item.description: A 35-year-old man from Tennessee was arrested in Winnipeg after being pulled over for speeding in the Exchange District last Thursday. Winnipeg Police discovered that he had multiple outstanding warra...

item.title: Rapid Wildfire Prompts Evacuations Near Whitecourt, Alberta
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire is currently burning southeast of Whitecourt, Alberta, forcing over 100 residents to evacuate their homes in Woodlands County. The fire, detected Monday afternoon, expanded quic...

item.title: Man Survives Tractor Accident While Repairing It in Uttarakhand
item.description: In a shocking incident in Udham Singh Nagar, Uttarakhand, a man narrowly escaped death after a tractor he was repairing suddenly moved and ran over him. The rear wheel crushed him, but thanks to the q...

item.title: Keir Starmer Faces Growing Pressure from Labour MPs Amid Leadership Speculation
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer is encountering increasing pressure from members of his own Labour Party to outline a timetable for stepping down. Over 70 of Labour’s 403 MPs, including Cabinet al...

item.title: Tanzania Health Ministry Proposes 1.8 Trillion/- Budget to Improve Healthcare Services
item.description: DODOMA — Tanzania's Health Minister, Mr Mohamed Mchengerwa, has tabled a 1.8 trillion/- budget for the 2026/2027 financial year, with 11 main priorities focused on strengthening the healthcare system....

item.title: Trump signals dialogue with Cuba amid economic and political tension
item.description: US President Donald Trump recently announced that he will be holding talks with Cuba, which he described as a 'failed country' in the wake of severe economic hardship following Washington’s capture of...

item.title: Labour MPs urged to back Starmer and avoid self-inflicted instability
item.description: In this editorial, The Independent argues that the Labour Party risks damaging its credibility and electoral prospects by continuing internal attacks on Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer. It draws paral...

item.title: Senator John Kennedy Denies Making Statement Attributed to Him by Trump
item.description: U.S. Senator John Neely Kennedy of Louisiana publicly refuted a statement that former President Donald Trump attributed to him in a recent Truth Social post. Trump claimed that Kennedy was demanding f...

item.title: Two KPC Board Members Exit After Company Privatization
item.description: The Kenyan Government has officially removed two directors from the Kenya Pipeline Company (KPC) board after the company completed its privatization in March 2026. Sharon Irungu-Asiyo and Mohamed Biri...

item.title: TS Academy introduces merchandise at inaugural TS Connect Lagos event
item.description: TS Academy don officially release their merchandise line during the very first TS Connect event wey hold for Lagos. The gathering pull over 1,400 students and alumni wey dey part of different learning...
